## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New math chapter or TD
- [ ] AI block (Feynman feedback)
- [ ] UI / CSS improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] `npm run verify:course-sidebar` passes (if a course page was touched)
- [ ] No KaTeX formula is compressed or in horizontal scroll
- [ ] `git diff --check` is clean
- [ ] Relevant docs updated if behavior changed (or noted below why not)

## For math chapters

- [ ] Built from the validated PDF sources in `lien/premiere/math.md`
- [ ] Source map included in the PR description or chapter notes
- [ ] Notation is stable across definition, method, example, and correction
- [ ] At least one exercise requires the student to produce a written answer

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything that needs context, known tradeoffs, or follow-up issues. -->
